help.header: gh tasks — manage tasks across GitHub Projects v2, Issues, and Milestones
help.flags:
Flags:
  --scope repo|org|user   Target scope
  --lang ja|en            Output language
  --help, -h              Show help
  --version, -v           Show version
help.cmd.add: Add an Issue / Project draft item
help.cmd.link: Link a PR to an Issue / Project item
error.add.titleRequired: title is required. Run `gh tasks add <title>`
error.scope.notImplemented: This scope is not yet implemented in v0.1.0
error.done.idRequired: Issue id is required. Run `gh tasks done <id>`
error.done.statusFieldMissing: Project has no `Status` field. Add one before running `gh tasks done` on an org/user-scope item
error.done.doneOptionMissing: Project `Status` field has no `Done` option. Add one before running `gh tasks done`
done.statusUpdated.project: Project item Status set to Done
error.link.argsRequired: Both PR and task numbers are required. Run `gh tasks link <pr> <task>`
link.added: Appended Closes link to the PR body
link.added.project: Linked PR and task on the project
plan.empty: no candidates fall in this range
plan.skippedExisting: Skipped (already bound to a different milestone)
plan.dryRunNote: (--dry-run: milestone creation and binding are skipped)
plan.empty.project: No project items fall in this range
plan.iterationFallback.project: No iteration matched; falling back to the current iteration
error.plan.iterationFieldMissing: Project has no `Iteration` field. Add one before running `gh tasks plan` on an org/user-scope project
error.plan.noIterationsAvailable: Project `Iteration` field has no iterations configured. Create iterations in the project settings
review.heading: Review
review.empty.project: No project items completed in this range
standup.heading: Standup
